treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 5 day course of antibiotics for pneumonia; 10 day course of Augmentin (1 dose received)
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient's symptoms initially improved but there was recrudescence of respiratory symptoms within 7 months.
Used to reduce inflammation in airways.

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 14 hours/day, settings: tidal volume 450, max pressure 30, pressure support max 15, pressure support min 6, EPAP max 16, EPAP min 14, with 1L.
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient required Trilogy mask for respiratory support.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with dyspnea, cough, and chest tightness.
Patient was empirically prescribed a ten-day course of Augmentin.
Patient was started on broad spectrum antibiotics (Vancomycin/Zosyn).
Patient was treated with a 5-day course of antibiotics for pneumonia.
Patient was treated with high dose steroids for TBM.
Settings on Trilogy machine were adjusted.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up at the listed appointments.
patient_outcome.complications: Recrudescence of respiratory symptoms within 7 months.
